Describe what happened.

1.
2.

## Expected Behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

## App Version
Example: `v0.13.0`

## Windows Version
Example: Windows 10 / Windows 11

## Clicker Settings
- CPS:
- Mode: Hold / Toggle
- Mouse: Left / Right
- Humanized: ON / OFF
- Pattern: Standard / Burst / Double Click / Hold then Burst
- Window Target: ON / OFF
- Run as administrator: ON / OFF

## Hotkeys
List any hotkeys used when the bug happened.

## Logs
If possible, attach logs from:

```text
%LocalAppData%\Kofge-Clicker
```

## Screenshots Or Video
Attach screenshots or a short video if it helps explain the issue.

## Additional Context
Add anything else that may help reproduce or understand the bug.
